The '''YT-1200 medium freighter''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] that served as the basis for [[Nova-Drive]]'s license-built [[3-Z light freighter]]. They had a tubular, elongated cockpit and rounded hull. Each vessel was 28 meters long.

==History==
The YT-1200, along with the [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210 light freighter]], was released after the [[YT-1000 light freighter/Legends|YT-1000]]. Customers preferred the older YT-1000 freighters, and once the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] was released, sales of the YT-1200 ground to an abrupt halt. CEC later took the existing YT-1200s and modified them into the [[YT-1250 freighter]].<ref name="MFOWM">''[[Millennium Falcon Owner's Workshop Manual]]''</ref>

==Characteristics==
The YT-1200 and YT-1210 were virtually the same, except for the fact that the YT-1200 had two cylindrical engines as compared to the YT-1210's three. The YT-1200 had the traditional side-mounted [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]], a long [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] boom on the front, and 10 attachment points for add-ons.<ref name="MFOWM" />
